conbody.p: Motherson recognized the importance of being self-reliant by building ROBIS [Robotic Automation and Innovative Solutions] in-house in India. Embracing this vision of innovation, flexibility, and self sufficiency, ROBIS was established in 2009. Headquartered in Chennai, ROBIS serves as a center for design, technology development, product innovation, manufacturing, and testing.

Recognizing its growing needs, ROBIS has established satellite centers in Europe for sales and service support. Our business segments include cloud solutions, material handling and warehouse automation, robots and robotic automation, assembly and testing solutions, joining solutions, and remanufacturing services.

Our driving force is one of perseverance, dedication, and self-sufficiency, evoking a sense of trust and reliability with our customers. Our uncompromised standards and commitment have made us stronger over the years, making ROBIS a trustworthy partner globally. Our strengths include technical proficiency, a global perspective, and customer-centric solutions.

section.title: Office Address
section.p: Motherson Automotive Technologies and Engineering – ROBIS
Survey No.: 172/1-5, 274/2, 276/7, Chengalpattu to Sriperumbudur Road, Vadagal Village,
Sriperumbudur Taluk, Kancheepuram – Dt Tamil Nadu – State
